subcodes.first_line: O Son of Abu-Turab! Say: O my God, my God! I perceive the fragrance of Thy Manifestation, yet know not which station hath been honored by Thy footsteps [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن ابی تراب قل الهی الهی اجد عرف ظهورک و لم ادر ای مقامی تشرف بقدومک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom
